chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.S-32 of 2026 Kunal Thakur v. Province of Sindh & others. Date ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M. A. No.82/2026. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on M. A. No.83/2026. 4. For hearing of Main Case. Applicant present in person. Date of hearing & Order: 26.01.2026. O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J.- Urgency granted. The petitioner seeks writ against harassment by police. It is alleged that such harassment is being caused at the behest of the private respondent, namely Gogi Ram alias Dewan Chand. Earlier, the petitioner’s father, namely Gopi Chand had made a similar complaint to the Sessions Judge, Shikarpur under Section 22-A, Cr.P.C, which was disposed of by order dated 31.05.2025 with a direction to police officers not to harass the applicant and his family. Thereafter, an FIR was lodged by Dewan Chand on 24.11.2025 against Gopi Chand and his sons, including the petitioner, for offences under Sections 406, 420, 34, PPC. The petitioner acknowledges that he is on bail in that case. Therefore, it appears that the petition has been brought to stall police investigation in that FIR. In this view of the matter, I am not inclined to exercise writ jurisdiction. Petition is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Qazi Tahir PA/*
